_meta.label: Sample data — replace with official dataset.
_meta.source: Illustrative accident-prone locations on the Delhi–Dehradun Expressway corridor. Not validated against NCRB/MoRTH records.

blackspots.name: Akshardham EPE Merge Point
blackspots.primaryHazard: High-speed lane merge at expressway entry

blackspots.name: Baghpat Toll Plaza Approach
blackspots.primaryHazard: Sudden deceleration at toll, rear-end collisions

blackspots.name: Baraut Level Crossing
blackspots.primaryHazard: Rural railway crossing, inadequate warning systems

blackspots.name: Shamli Bypass Junction
blackspots.primaryHazard: Expressway–state highway junction, wrong-way local traffic

blackspots.name: Muzaffarnagar Fog Zone
blackspots.primaryHazard: Dense winter fog, limited visibility, high-speed trucks

blackspots.name: Saharanpur City Approach
blackspots.primaryHazard: Urban–expressway merge, pedestrian crossing on slip road

blackspots.name: Roorkee Canal Bridge
blackspots.primaryHazard: Single-lane bridge approach, no median barrier, overloaded trucks

blackspots.name: Mohand Ghat Curves
blackspots.primaryHazard: Sharp foothill curves, gradient change, overloaded trucks losing brakes

blackspots.name: Dehradun Valley Descent
blackspots.primaryHazard: Steep descent into valley, fog pocket, mixed speed traffic
